arts.ttl: Steve Clarke issues Scotland rallying cry to help young players make crucial first-team step
arts.sum: Scotland head coach Steve Clarke says "everybody has to sit down and try to work out" a solution for the lack of first-team minutes for young Scottish players. “We need to come up with something that's maybe a little bit different that we haven't tried before to see if we can improve it because if we keep doing what we're doing it's not going to get any better so we have to try and improve,” he said.

arts.ttl: Scott McTominay pulls back the curtain on Scotland’s dressing room to reveal 'most successful side ever' ambition
arts.sum: McTominay reckons the players have been too 'shy' and need to push on

arts.ttl: Why next five days are key to Scotland's World Cup hopes
arts.sum: The Nations League matches with Croatia and Poland could determined Scotland's World Cup hopes. Here's why...

arts.ttl: 'Tough' Scott McTominay blows Napoli pundit away as incredible numbers show he's more than just goals
arts.sum: McTominay is flying in Serie A as he signs off for the international break

arts.ttl: Listen: Scotland U19 boss in appeal to clubs over youths
arts.sum: Martin Dowden and Craig Telfer chat about Celtic v Chelsea and the weekend’s Championship

arts.ttl: Revealed: The x-rated insult David Coote 'used to describe Andy Robertson' after clashing with the Liverpool star... after man said to be suspended Premier League referee was 'filmed snorting white powder'
arts.sum: Premier League referee Coote has been suspended by the PGMOL after a video emerged showing him calling Klopp a 'German ****' and 'f***ing arrogant'. Coote also called Liverpool 's***'.

arts.ttl: Scotland can use Croatia formula as path to glory as Craig Gordon tells Tartan Army they'll go all out at Hampden
arts.sum: Steve Clarke and his troops are fighting to hang on to their place among Europe's elite in the Nations League
